description_long: This is a double bed featuring a minimalist metal frame with a slatted headboard and footboard. The bed is topped with a thick mattress, two pillows, and a loosely draped comforter that covers most of the sleeping surface and hangs over the sides. The bedding appears soft and slightly rumpled, suggesting recent use or a casual, lived-in look. The frame is elevated on short legs, providing a small clearance beneath the bed. The headboard and footboard are constructed from evenly spaced vertical metal rods, giving the bed a modern, airy appearance. The overall color scheme is a uniform light gray, contributing to a clean and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern double bed with a slatted metal frame, thick mattress, two pillows, and a draped comforter in light gray tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted headboard, two pillows, and the comforter draped over the mattress with some overhang on the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the metal frame, and the way the comforter is bunched and draped over the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slatted footboard, the back of the pillows, and the comforter extending over the foot of the bed.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right pillow, the mattress, and the comforter cascading over the right edge of the bed.
